title: SIOP: Self-Induced Outcome Potential
title_zh: SIOP：面向长程 LLM 智能体的自诱导结果潜势
summary: Verifier-free turn-level credit assignment for long-horizon LLM agents.
summary_zh: 面向长程 LLM 智能体、无需验证器的回合级信用分配方法。

title: InfoReasoner: Optimizing Agentic Reasoning with Retrieval
title_zh: InfoReasoner：基于检索的智能体推理优化
summary: Synthetic semantic information gain rewards for retrieval actions in LLM agentic reasoning.
summary_zh: 为 LLM 智能体推理中的检索动作合成语义信息增益奖励。

title: SVDecode: Distribution-Aligned Decoding for Efficient LLM Task Adaptation
title_zh: SVDecode：面向高效 LLM 任务适配的分布对齐解码
summary: Distribution-aligned decoding for efficient LLM task adaptation.
summary_zh: 面向高效 LLM 任务适配的分布对齐解码。

title: AgentsCoDriver
title_zh: AgentsCoDriver：大模型驱动的协同驾驶
summary: LLM-powered collaborative driving with lifelong learning for connected autonomous agents.
summary_zh: 面向网联自动驾驶智能体、具备终身学习能力的大模型协同驾驶。

title: AgentsCoMerge
title_zh: AgentsCoMerge：多车道汇入的协同决策
summary: Collaborative decision-making for multi-lane merging with LLM-powered agents.
summary_zh: 由大模型驱动的多车道汇入协同决策。

title: CP-Guard+: A New Paradigm for Collaborative Perception Security
title_zh: CP-Guard+：协同感知安全的新范式
summary: Malicious-agent detection and defense for collaborative perception under complex attack settings.
summary_zh: 面向复杂攻击场景的协同感知恶意智能体检测与防御。

title: CP-Guard: Malicious Agent Detection and Defense
title_zh: CP-Guard：恶意智能体检测与防御
summary: Defense for collaborative bird's-eye-view perception against malicious agents.
summary_zh: 面向协同鸟瞰图感知、抵御恶意智能体的防御方法。
